args: ROOT="$HOME/.cursor/plugins/local/codex-headless"; if [ ! -d "$ROOT" ]; then echo "codex-headless not found at $ROOT" >&2; exit 127; fi; export PATH="/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.volta/bin:$PATH"; if [ -d "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" ]; then NVM_LATEST=$(ls -1 "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); [ -n "$NVM_LATEST" ] && export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/$NVM_LATEST/bin:$PATH"; fi; cd "$ROOT" || exit 127; if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -d node_modules/tsx ]; then exec node --import tsx src/mcp/server.ts; fi; if [ -x bin/codex-headless-mcp ]; then exec bin/codex-headless-mcp; fi; echo "codex-headless MCP: run pnpm install in $ROOT" >&2; exit 127
